title: Earnings call transcript: SNDL Q4 2024 sees revenue growth, stock rises
text: SNDL Inc reported strong Q4 2024 results with revenue reaching $257.7 million, representing a 3.7% year-over-year increase. The company achieved record full-year net revenue of $920 million and gross profit of $240 million. CEO Zack George stated: Records are meant to be broken and we know we will continue to do so in the future. The company achieved positive free cash flow of $8.9 million for the full year, exceeding guidance. Q4 gross margin improved to 26.7%. Full-year gross margin reached 26.1%, up 520 basis points. Cannabis operations achieved four consecutive quarters of positive gross profit. Stock price increased 4.19% following the earnings announcement. Management projects flat revenue growth for the liquor segment in 2025 and targets $100 million in annualized free cash flow within three years. The company also announced a Canadian Securities Exchange listing application, providing additional optionality for future growth.
